title: uragoga subrufa
intro: Uragoga subrufa, also known as the Uragoga subrufa plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Medicinally, Uragoga subrufa is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Uragoga subrufa typically involve drying the plant's leaves and roots, followed by infusions or decoctions to create teas or tinctures for medicinal use.
